text_template: If you are looking for some options or if you are looking to upgrade a smart home you really can go past Zooz. They got their 800 series Z long range power strip the Zen 20800LR. So you can turn a single outlet into multiple individually controllable smart sockets. You can drop it under a desk behind your TV unit or in your server rack to tame all those always gadgets and still monitor and automate each outlet separately. It perfect for things like network gear chargers lamps game consoles anywhere you want more smart control without adding a bunch of separate plugs. Partner, and they've been helping Nabu by providing long-range devices to test the Home Assistant Connect ZWA2 radio, so you know you're in friendly hands. Beyond their power strip, Zooz offers a full range of affordable, innovative gear, water leak sensors, motorized water valve controllers, smart plugs and sink controllers, plus their Zen78 high power relay for loads up to 40 amps for pool pumps and air compressors. For the best prices on all Zooz products, head over to thesmartesthouse.com. That's thesmartesthouse.com.
